title: Vitamin C (as Ascorbic Acid,Ester-C® Calcium Ascorbate, Boron Ascorbate, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Potassium Ascorbate, Magnesium Ascorbate, Ferrous Ascorbate, Zinc Ascorbate, Manganese Ascorbate)

Calcium (as Calcium Carbonate,Dicalcium Phosphate, d-Calcium Pantothenate, Ester-C® Calcium Ascorbate, Calcium Aspartate, Calcium Citrate, Calcium Ketoglutarate, Calcium Malate, Calcium Fumarate, Calcium Succinate, Calcium Gluconate and Calcium Histidinate)
Iron (as Ferrous Fumarate,Ketoglutarate, Bisglycinate, Succinate, Aspartate, Amino Acid Chelate, Ascorbate, Citrate, Histidinate, Malate and Gluconate)
Magnesium (as Magnesium Oxide, Aspartate, Succinate, Citrate, Malate, Ketoglutarate, Fumarate, Gluconate, Histidinate and Ascorbate)
Zinc (as Zinc Citrate, Ketoglutarate, Fumarate, Malate, Succinate, Histidinate, Picolinate, Aspartate, Monomethenomine, Gluconate and Ascorbate)
Manganese (as Manganese Gluconate, Succinate, Histidinate, Aspartate, Citrate, Amino Acid Chelate and Ascorbate)
Potassium (as Potassium Citrate, Fumarate, Succinate, Malate, Ascorbate, Aspartate and Gluconate)
Boron Complex (as BoronAspartate, Boron Citrate and Boron Ascorbate)
Fish Oil and Borage Oil (containing Omega-3 and Omega-6 Lipids)
Polyphenol Complex(Red Wine Extract, Green Tea Extract (Camellia sinensis) (leaf))
Vegetable Complex(From Beets, Yams, Celery, Brussels Sprouts, Carrots, Cauliflower, Broccoli)
Citrus Complex(from Lemon, Orange, Lime, Grapefruit)
Vitamin Co-Factor Complex (Pyridoxal 5’ Phosphate (Vitamin B-6 Co-Factor) and Pantethine (Pantothenic Acid Co-Factor))
